meaning: n.大资本家,巨头,富豪,要人,...大王
examples: During the aspectant struggle with the foreign capital magnate, lots of shortage in the local retail trade exposed.
Mr Martinelli, a supermarket magnate, is not helping.
Software magnate Vivek Ranadive has put together a package to keep the team in Sacramento.
With or without vines, Shapiro, a former penny stock trader, lived like a grape magnate.
